prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to England as it discusses the introduction of a GCSE in British Sign Language, which is under the remit of the Department for Education in England, and references the implementation of the Equality Act 2010 and the public sector equality duty specifically within the context of English education.
